reference: “Yanzu muna bera mai watanni 4 wadanda ba su da ciwon sukari ba wadanda ke da suke fama da ciwon sukari,” in ji shi.

input.mt: Ya kara da cewa: "Yanzu muna da beraye masu wata huɗu da ba su da ciwon sukari, kuma a dā suna da ciwon sukari".
input.src: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

reference: Dokta Ehud Ur, farfesan magani a Jami’ar Dalhousie da ke Halifax, Nova Scotia kuma shugaban sashen likitanci da bangaren kimiyya na kungiyar masu ciwon sikari ta Kanada ya yi gargadin cewa har yanzu binciken yana kan farkonsa.

input.mt: Dokta Ehud Ur, farfesa a jami'ar Dalhousie da ke Halifax, Nova Scotia kuma shugaban sashen kula da cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan da cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan cututtukan
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Kamar wasu ƙwararrun, yana da shakkun cewa ko za a iya warkar da ciwon sukari, inda ya bayyana cewa sakamakon bincike ba shi da alaƙa da mutanen da tuni su ke da nau’in ciwon sukari na 1.

input.mt: Kamar wasu masana, yana da shakku game da ko za a iya warkar da ciwon sukari, yana lura cewa waɗannan binciken ba su da amfani ga mutanen da suke da ciwon sukari na Type 1.
input.src: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.

reference: A ranar Litinin, Sara Danius, sakatariyar dindindin ta Kwamitin Adabi na kungiyar nagartattu a Kwalejin Nazarin Sweden, ta sanar a bainar jama'a yayin wani shirin rediyo a Sveriges Radio a Sweden kwamitin, ba zai iya kaiwa ga Bob Dylan kai tsaye ba game da lashe kyautar Nobel ta 2016 a Adabi, ta yi watsi da ita kokarinta na isa gare shi.

input.mt: A ranar Litinin, Sara Danius, sakatare na dindindin na Kwamitin Nobel don Adabi a Kwalejin Sweden, ta sanar a fili a lokacin wani shirin rediyo a Sveriges Radio a Sweden kwamitin, ba zai iya tuntuɓar Bob Dylan kai tsaye game da lashe kyautar Nobel na Adabi ta 2016, ya watsar da ƙoƙarinsa don isa gare shi.
input.src: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.

reference: Danius ya ce, “Yanzu haka ba mwa yin komi. Na kira na kuma aika emails zuwa abokan aikinsa na kusa na kuma anshi amsoshi masu kyau. A yanzu haka, wannan bai isa ba.”

input.mt: Danius ya ce, "A yanzu ba mu yi kome ba. Na kira kuma na aika imel zuwa ga abokin aikinsa mafi kusa kuma na karɓi amsoshi masu kyau. A yanzu, wannan ya isa".
input.src: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

reference: A baya, Shugaban kamfanin Ring, Jamie Siminoff, ya bayyana cewa kamfanin ya fara lokacin da ba a jiyo sauti kararrawar jikin ƙofar sa daga shagonsa a cikin garejinsa.

input.mt: A baya, Shugaba na Ring, Jamie Siminoff, ya lura da kamfanin ya fara ne lokacin da ba a ji kararrawar kofarsa daga shagonsa a garejinsa.
input.src: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.

reference: Ya ce, ya gina ƙararrawar ƙofa ta WiFi.

input.mt: Ya ce ya gina ƙofar ƙofar WiFi, ya ce.
input.src: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

reference: A ƙarshen 2017, Siminoff ya bayyana a tashar telebijin mai sayarwa ta QVC.

input.mt: A ƙarshen 2017, Siminoff ya bayyana a tashar talabijin ta QVC.
input.src: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

reference: Ring ta kuma sasanta takardar kotu tsakanin wata kamfanin adawa na tsaro wato ADT Corporation.

input.mt: Ring kuma ya warware karar da kamfanin tsaro mai fafatawa, ADT Corporation.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Yayinda allurar gwaji rigakafi guda daya ta bayyana tana iya rage mutuwar cutar ta Ebola, har zuwa yanzu, babu wasu kwayoyi da aka nuna da suka dace da maganin cututtukan da suke kamuwa da su.

input.mt: Ko da yake ana ganin cewa allurar rigakafi guda ɗaya za ta iya rage yawan mutanen da suke mutuwa daga cutar Ebola, har zuwa yanzu ba a tabbatar da cewa akwai wasu magunguna da za su iya magance kamuwa da cutar ba.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Wani hadaddiyar giyar, ZMapp, da farko ya nuna alƙawari a fagen, amma nazarin yau da kullun ya nuna cewa ba shi da fa'ida fiye da yadda ake neman hana mutuwa.

input.mt: Ɗaya daga cikin maganin rigakafi, ZMapp, da farko ya nuna alkawari a filin, amma nazarin da aka yi ya nuna cewa yana da ƙarancin amfani fiye da yadda ake nema wajen hana mutuwa.
input.src: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

reference: a nan gwajin PALM, ZMapp yayi bauta a wajen kula, hakan na nufin masana fasaha sun yi amfani da shi a matsayin kasan idan ka kimanta da hanyoyin guda uku nashi.

input.mt: A cikin gwajin PALM, ZMapp ya yi aiki a matsayin mai sarrafawa, ma'ana masana kimiyya sun yi amfani da shi a matsayin tushe kuma sun kwatanta sauran jiyya uku da shi.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: Masu wasan tsalle tsalle na Amurka sun goyi bayan wasikar kwamitin gasar olympic tare da yarda da cikakkiyar bukatar duk masu wasan olympic da su yada maganar samar da yanayi mara hadari ga dukkan yan wasanmu.

input.mt: Ƙungiyar Gymnastics ta Amurka ta goyi bayan wasiƙar Kwamitin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Wasannin Was
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

reference: Mun yarda da bayanin USOC cewa bukatun 'yan wasanmu da kungiyar mu, da wasanninsu, na iya zama mafi alheri ta ci gaba tare da canji mai ma'ana a cikin ƙungiyarmu, maimakon ƙaddamar da doka.

input.mt: Mun yarda da sanarwa na USOC cewa bukatun 'yan wasanmu da kungiyoyinmu, da kuma wasanninsu, za a iya bauta musu mafi kyau ta hanyar ci gaba da canji mai ma'ana a cikin ƙungiyarmu, maimakon soke takardar shaidar.
input.src: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

reference: Kungiyan daki motsa jiki na USA na goyon bayan bincike mai zaman kanta wadda take zaton zata kara haske kan cin zarafi wadda wadanda suka tsira daga Larry Nassar suka bayana wadda ba a gano ba na tsawon lokaci kuma ke rungume da duk wani canji mai muhimmanci.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics ta goyi bayan bincike mai zaman kanta wanda zai iya haskaka haske game da yadda cin zarafin rabo da aka kwatanta da ƙarfin hali ta hanyar waɗanda suka tsira daga Larry Nassar zai iya kasancewa ba a gano shi ba har tsawon lokaci kuma ya rungumi duk wani canji da ya dace.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: Gidan motsa jiki na Amurka da USOC suna da manufa ɗaya - sa wasan motsa jiki, da sauransu, ya zama mai aminci yadda zai yiwu 'yan wasa su bi mafarkinsu cikin aminci, tabbatacce kuma mai ba da ƙarfi.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics da USOC suna da manufa iri ɗaya  sanya wasan motsa jiki, da sauransu, mafi aminci ga 'yan wasa su bi burinsu a cikin yanayi mai aminci, mai kyau da ƙarfafawa.
input.src: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

reference: A duk tsawon 1960, Brzezinski yayi ma John F. Kenedy aiki a matsayin mai bada shawara kuma yayi aiki da gwamnatin Lyndon B. Johnson.

input.mt: A cikin shekarun 1960, Brzezinski yayi aiki ga John F. Kennedy a matsayin mai ba da shawara sannan kuma gwamnatin Lyndon B. Johnson.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: A yayin zabukan 1976 ya shawarci Carter kan manufofin kasashen waje, sannan ya zama mai ba da shawara kan Tsaro na kasa (NSA) daga 1977 zuwa 1981, ya gaji Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: A lokacin zaɓen 1976 ya ba Carter shawara game da manufofin waje, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan tsaron ƙasa (NSA) daga 1977 zuwa 1981, yana bin Henry Kissinger.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: kasancewarsa dan NSA, ya taimaka wa Carter a harkokin dokokin kasashen waje wajen kula da lamuran duniya, kamar Yarjejeniyar Camp David, 1978; daidaita alaƙar Amurka da China tana tunanin ƙarshen shekarun 1970; juyin juya halin Iran, wanda ya haifar da rikicin garkuwar da Iran, 1979; da mamayar Soviet a Afghanistan, 1979.

input.mt: A matsayinsa na NSA, ya taimaka wa Carter wajen magance al'amuran duniya, kamar Yarjejeniyar Camp David, 1978; daidaita dangantakar Amurka da Sin a ƙarshen shekarun 1970; Juyin juya halin Iran, wanda ya haifar da rikicin garkuwa da Iran, 1979; da mamayewar Soviet a Afghanistan, 1979.
input.src: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

reference: Fin ɗin, da ke nuna Ryan Gosling da Emma Stone, ya sami shiga cikin duk manyan ɓangarorin gasar.

input.mt: Fim din, wanda ya ƙunshi Ryan Gosling da Emma Stone, ya sami takardun shaida a duk manyan rukuni.
input.src: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

reference: Gosling da Stone sun sami shiga neman cikin kyautar Fitaccen Jarumi da Jaruma.

input.mt: Gosling da Stone sun karbi takardun ga Best Actor da Actress bi da bi.
input.src: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

reference: Waƙoƙi biyu daga fim, Audition (Wawaye Waɗanda Suke Mafarki) da Birnin Taurari, sun karɓi zaɓi don mafi kyawun waƙar asali. Lionsgate studio ta sami nadin 26 - fiye da kowane sauran ɗakunan studio.

input.mt: Waƙoƙi biyu daga fim ɗin, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) da City of Stars, sun sami takara don mafi kyawun waƙar asali. Lionsgate studio ya sami takara 26  fiye da kowane ɗakin karatu.
input.src: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

reference: A daren ranar Lahadi shugaban kasar Amurka Donald Trump a cikin wata sanarwa da aka fitar ta sanarwar sakataren, ya sanar da dakarun kasar Amurka zasu bar kasar Syria.

input.mt: A daren ranar Lahadi, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump, a cikin wata sanarwa da ya bayar ta bakin sakataren yada labarai, ya sanar da cewa sojojin Amurka za su bar Syria.
input.src: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

reference: An bayar da sanarwar ce bayan Trump ya yi ganawa ta wayar salula da Shugaban Turkiyya Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

input.mt: An sanar da hakan ne bayan da Trump ya yi hira ta waya da shugaban Turkiyya Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Haka kuma Turkiyya za ta karbi aikin gadin mayakan ISIS da aka kama waɗanda, sanarwar ta ce, kasashen Turai suka ki mayar da su.

input.mt: Turkiyya za ta kuma dauki nauyin tsare mayakan ISIS da aka kama wadanda, a cewar sanarwar, kasashen Turai sun ki mayar da su gida.
input.src: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

reference: Wannan ya tabbatar cewa ba wai kawai wasu dabbobin dinasour suna da gashi ba, wata fadar ma da ta yadu, amma ta yi cikakken bayanin da rubabbun halittu ba za su iya ba, kamar su launi da kuma tsarin kashi uku.

input.mt: Wannan ba wai kawai ya tabbatar da cewa akalla wasu dinosaur suna da fuka-fuki ba, ka'idar da ta riga ta bazu, amma yana ba da cikakkun bayanai da burbushin halittu ba za su iya ba, kamar launi da tsari na uku.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: Masana ilimin kimiya sun ce fiffiken dabbar launi kasa ne a sama mai dauke da kodaden launi da launin toka-toka ta karkashin ta.

input.mt: Masana kimiyya sun ce fuka-fuki na wannan dabba yana da launin ruwan kasa a saman tare da fari ko carotenoid launi a kasa.
input.src: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

reference: Binciken ya kuma ba da haske game da juyin halittar fukafiki a tsuntsaye.

input.mt: Ƙari ga haka, wannan binciken ya ba da haske game da yadda tsuntsaye suka samo gashin kansu.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Domin gashin fuka-fukin dinosaur bashi da isasshen tsari, wanda ake kira kara, amma suna da sauran sifofin gashin fuka-fukan — tsandar gashi da kananan — masu binciken sun kammala cewa wata kila karan wani cigaba ne na juyin halittan wadannan sauran sifofin.

input.mt: Saboda gashin dinosaur ba su da shaft mai kyau, wanda ake kira rachis, amma suna da wasu halaye na gashin gashin gashi  barbs da barbules  masu bincike sun kammala cewa rachis wataƙila ci gaban juyin halitta ne na baya fiye da waɗannan sauran halaye.
input.src: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

reference: Tsarin gashin fuka-fukan ya nuna cewa ba ana amfani da su ba ne domin tashi sama, sai dai domin samar da tsarin daidaiton dumin jiki da kuma motsawa. Binciken ya nuna cewa duk da cewa jelar ta wani karamin kakan kadangare ce, abin na nuna cewa gashin balagagge ne ba na dan tsako ba.

input.mt: Masu bincike sun ce, ko da yake wannan ƙugu ne na wani matashi mai suna dinosaur, amma a cikin samfurin an nuna fuka-fuki na manya, ba na wata yarinya ba.
input.src: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Masu binciken sun nuna cewa, duk da cewa sun gamsu jelar ta kakannin kadangare ce, ta kuma nuna cewa ta balagagge ce ba jariri ba.

input.mt: Masu binciken sun nuna cewa, ko da yake wannan wutsiya ce ta wani matashi mai suna dinosaur, samfurin ya nuna fuka-fuki na manya ba na wata yarinya ba.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Jiya da safe a ƙasar Turkiyya, wani bom na cikin mota da aka tayar a hedikwatar ‘yansanda da ke Gaziantep, ya yi sanadiyyar mutuwar jami’an ‘yan sanda biyu tare da raunata wasu mutane sama da ashirin.

input.mt: Wani motar bam da aka fashe a hedkwatar 'yan sanda a Gaziantep, Turkiyya jiya da safe ya kashe jami'an 'yan sanda biyu kuma ya jikkata fiye da mutane ashirin.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Ofishin gwamnan ya ce jamia’an yan sanda goma sha tara ne su ka sami raunuka.

input.mt: Ofishin gwamnan ya ce goma sha tara daga cikin wadanda suka jikkata jami'an 'yan sanda ne.
input.src: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

reference: 'Yan sanda sun ce suna zargin wani da ake zargin dan ta'addar Daesh (ISIL) ne da alhakin kai harin.

input.mt: 'Yan sanda sun ce suna zaton wani da ake zargi da 'yan ta'addan Daesh (ISIL) ne ke da alhakin harin.
input.src: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.

reference: Ana amfani da haskawa da juyawa tare domin sanin lambar Rossby ta tauraro, wadda take da alaƙa da gudanar jini.

input.mt: Ana amfani da haske da juyawa tare don ƙayyade lambar Rossby ta tauraron, wanda ke da alaƙa da kwararar plasma.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: Karantar lambar Rossby, karancin mai aiki da tauraruwar dangane da sauyawar mayan karfe.

input.mt: Ƙananan adadin Rossby, tauraron ya fi ƙarancin aiki dangane da jujjuyawar magnetic.
input.src: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

reference: A lokacin tafiyarsa, Iwasaki ya shiga cikin matsala a lokuta da yawa.

input.mt: A lokacin tafiyarsa, Iwasaki ya sami matsala sau da yawa.
input.src: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

reference: Yan fashin teku sun yi masa fashi, mahaukacin kare ya kai masa farmaki a Tibet, ya guje wa aure a Nepal kuma an kama shi a India.

input.mt: 'Yan fashi sun sace shi, wani kare mai hauka ya kai masa hari a Tibet, ya tsere daga aure a Nepal kuma an kama shi a Indiya.
input.src: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

reference: Kwatancin 802.11n na aiki duk akan mita 2.4Ghz da 5.0Ghz.

input.mt: Tsarin 802.11n yana aiki akan duka sauye-sauyen 2.4Ghz da 5.0Ghz.
input.src: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

reference: Wannan zai ba shi damar zama mai dacewa da baya 802.11a, 802.11b da 802.11g, matukar dai tashar tushe tana da rediyo biyu.

input.mt: Wannan zai ba shi damar zama mai jituwa tare da 802.11a, 802.11b da 802.11g, idan tashar tushe tana da rediyo biyu.
input.src: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

reference: Gudun 802.11n na da saurin da ya zarce na wanda ya gabace shi da tsaikon saurin da ya kai 600Mbit/s.

input.mt: Saurin 802.11n yana da sauri fiye da na magabtansa tare da matsakaicin ƙarfin aiki na 600Mbit/s.
input.src: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

reference: Duvall, wanda ke da mata da manyan yaya guda biyu, bai burge Miller ba, wanda ke da alaƙa da labarin.

input.mt: Duvall, wanda ya yi aure kuma yana da yara biyu da suka manyanta, bai yi tasiri sosai a kan Miller ba.
input.src: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

reference: Da aka nemi tsokacinsa, sai Miller ya ce, “Mike ya yi magana da yawa lokacin zaman jin ba’asin...ina kan shiri saboda haka ban saurari abin da yake cewa ba.”

input.mt: Lokacin da aka tambaye shi don yin sharhi, Miller ya ce, "Mike yayi magana sosai a lokacin sauraron... Na shirya don haka ban ji ainihin abin da yake faɗi ba".
input.src: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

reference: “Za mu kokarin rage fitar da gurbataccen carbon dioxide a kowane bangare na GDP ta wani muhimmin mataki a 2020 daga matakin 2005,” in ji Hu.

input.mt: Hu ya ce: "Za mu yi kokari mu rage fitar da iskar carbon dioxide a kowace raka'a na GDP da wani gagarumin gefe zuwa shekarar 2020 daga matakin shekarar 2005.
input.src: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

reference: Bai sanya wani adadi don ragewar ba, inda ya ce hakan zai danganta ne da abin da tattalin arzikin China ke fitarwa.

input.mt: Bai sanya wani adadi ba don ragewa, yana cewa za a yi su bisa ga yawan tattalin arzikin kasar Sin.
input.src: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.

reference: Hu ya karfafa kasashe masu tasowa “da su guji tsohuwar hanyar gurbatar da farko da kuma tsabtace ta daga baya.”

input.mt: Hu ya ƙarfafa ƙasashe masu tasowa "su guji tsohuwar hanyar gurɓata su da farko kuma su tsabtace su daga baya".
input.src: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

reference: Ya kara da cewa “ kada su yunkura, sai dai kuwa ana sa su daukar nauyi sama da na matakin cigaban su, da kuma daukan alhaki da iyawar su.”

input.mt: Ya kara da cewa "koyaya, bai kamata a nemi su ɗauki alhakin da ya wuce matakin ci gaban su ba, alhakin su da kuma iyawarsu".
input.src: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

reference: Kungiyar bincike na Iraq sun gabatar da rohotonsu da karfe 12.00 GMT a yau.

input.mt: Kungiyar Nazarin Iraqi ta gabatar da rahotonta a karfe 12.00 GMT a yau.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: An yi kashedin cewa babu tabbacin cewa duk wani mataki da za’a dauka a kasar Iraki a yanzu zai iya maganin yakin banbance banbance darika, karuwar rikici ko ma dosar rashin doka da oda.

input.mt: Ya yi gargadi Babu wanda zai iya ba da tabbacin cewa duk wani mataki a Iraki a wannan lokacin zai kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe na addinai, ƙara tashin hankali, ko kuma saukowa zuwa rikici.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Rahoton ya buɗe ne tare da roƙo don buɗe muhawara da kuma kafa yarjejeniya a Amurka game da manufofin Gabas ta Tsakiya.

input.mt: Rahoton ya fara da kira ga tattaunawa ta bude ido da kuma samar da yarjejeniya a Amurka game da manufofin gabas ta tsakiya.
input.src: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

reference: Rahoton ya yi matuƙar yin suka ga kusan dukkan ɓangarorin manufar Ɓangaren zartaswa na yanzu akan ƙasar Iraƙi inda ya nemi a gaggauta canja alƙibla.

input.mt: Rahoton yana da matukar sukar kusan kowane bangare na manufofin zartarwa na yanzu ga Iraki kuma yana kira ga gaggawa canji na shugabanci.
input.src: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.

reference: Na farko daga cikin shawarwarin da ta ba su guda 78 shi ne cewa ya kamata a dauki wani sabon shiri na diflomasiyya kafin karshen wannan shekarar don kiyaye iyakokin Iraki kan tsoma bakin da ake yi da kuma sake kulla alakar diflomasiyya da makwabtanta.

input.mt: Na farko daga cikin shawarwari 78 da ta bayar shi ne cewa ya kamata a dauki sabon shiri na diflomasiyya kafin karshen wannan shekara don tabbatar da iyakar Iraki daga hare-haren abokan gaba da kuma sake kafa dangantakar diflomasiyya da makwabta.
input.src: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

reference: Majalisar dattijai da matar shugaban kasar Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ta sanar da fitowar takarar shugaban kasa a yammacin jiya a La Plata, gari dake kilomita 50 (Mil 31) daga Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Sanata na yanzu kuma uwargidan farko na Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ta sanar da takarar ta a matsayin shugaban kasa a daren jiya a La Plata, birni mai nisan kilomita 50 daga Buenos Aires.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Mrs. Kirchner ta bayyana ra’niyyarta ta tsayawa takarar shugabanci a Gidan wasannin Argentina, wurin da ta yi amfani da shi domin fara kanfen ɗinta na takarar Majalisar Dattawa a shekarar 2005 a matsayinta na wakiliyar Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Mrs. Kirchner ta sanar da niyyarta ta tsaya takarar shugaban kasa a gidan wasan kwaikwayo na Argentina, wuri guda da ta fara yakin neman zaben ta 2005 don Majalisar Dattijai a matsayin memba na tawagar lardin Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Muhawarar ta samo asali sakamakon rudani game da kashe kudi wajen bada tallafi da sake gine-gine bayan faruwar guguwar katrina, abinda masu ra’ayin mazan jiya su ke tsokana da cewa “Cuwa-cuwar Bush ta New Orleans”

input.mt: Wannan muhawara ta taso ne ta hanyar jayayya game da kashe kuɗi don taimako da sake ginawa bayan Hurricane Katrina; wanda wasu masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na kudi suka lakafta "Bush's New Orleans Deal".
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Korafe-korafe kan yunƙurin sake gine-ginen ya maida hankali ne a kan bayar da kwangilolin sake ginin ga waɗanda ake ganin ‘yan cikin gida ne a Washington.

input.mt: Ƙididdigar 'yanci game da kokarin sake ginawa ta mayar da hankali ne akan bayar da kwangila na sake ginawa ga mutanen da aka ɗauka a cikin Washington.
input.src: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

reference: Fiye da mutane miliyan huɗu suka je Rome don halartar jana’izar.

input.mt: Mutane fiye da miliyan huɗu ne suka je Roma don su halarci jana'izar.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: mutanen da suka halarta sun yi yawa yadda ba zai yiwu kowa ya iya samun shiga wajen jana’izar ba da ke dandalin Peter.

input.mt: Yawan mutanen da suka halarci taron ya yi yawa sosai har ba kowa ba ne zai iya halartar jana'izar a dandalin St. Peter.
input.src: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

reference: An kafa manya garkuwan talabijin da dama wurare da dama a Rome domin mutane su samu daman kallon bikin.

input.mt: An saka manyan allon talabijin da yawa a wurare dabam-dabam a Roma don mutane su kalli bikin.
input.src: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

reference: A sauran biranen kasar Italiya da kuma sauran kasashen duniya musamman a Poland, an kafa makamancin ginuwar wanda ya samu dubiyar jama’a da dama.

input.mt: A wasu birane da yawa a Italiya da kuma sauran ƙasashen duniya, musamman a Poland, an yi irin waɗannan shirye-shiryen, kuma mutane da yawa sun saurare su.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Masana tarihi sun soki manufofin Hukumar bincike ta Amurka saboda mai da hankali wajen laifuka wadanda ke da saukin warwarewa, musamman satar motoci, domin kawai su nuna yawan nasarar da su ke samu.

input.mt: Masana tarihi sun soki manufofin da suka gabata na FBI don mayar da hankali ga albarkatun kan shari'o'in da ke da sauƙin warwarewa, musamman shari'o'in mota da aka sata, tare da niyyar haɓaka nasarar hukumar.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Majalisa ta fara samar da kuɗaɗe ga tsarin batsa a kasafin kudi na 2005 kuma ta fayyace cewa dole FBI ta ware jami’ai 10 don lura da hotunan batsa na manya.

input.mt: Majalisa ta fara tallafawa shirin lalata a shekara ta 2005 kuma ta ƙayyade cewa FBI dole ne ta sadaukar da wakilai 10 ga batsa ga manya.
input.src: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

reference: Robin Uthapa ya ci makunan wasan kriket mafi sama, guduwa 70 cikin kawai ƙwallaye 41 ta hanyar bugawa huɗu guda 11 da kuma shida guda 2.

input.mt: Robin Uthappa ya zira kwallaye mafi girma, 70 a cikin kwallaye 41 kawai ta hanyar buga 11 huɗu da shida biyu.
input.src: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

reference: ‘Yan wasan kurket na tsakiya, Sachin Tendulkar da Rahul Dravid, sun yi kokari kuma sun yi haɗin gwiwa tare a Tseren-ɗari.

input.mt: 'Yan wasan tsakiya, Sachin Tendulkar da Rahul Dravid, sun yi aiki mai kyau kuma sun yi haɗin gwiwar gudu ɗari.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: Amma, bayan rashin nasarar kyaftin din wicket Indiya kawai tayi asarar guda 36 tana kwance wickets 7 don kawo karshen innings.

input.mt: Amma, bayan da ta rasa wicket na kyaftin India ta yi kawai 36 runs ta rasa 7 wickets don kawo karshen innings.
input.src: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

reference: Shugaban kasar America George W. Bush ya iso Singapore a safiya 16 ga Nuwanba, domin fara yawon bude ido na tsawon mako daya a Asiya.

input.mt: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya isa Singapore da safe a ranar 16 ga watan Nuwamba, yana fara yawon shakatawa na mako guda a Asiya.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Mataimakin Firayi Ministan Singapore Wong Kan Sang ne ya tarbe shi, sannan su ka tattauna al’amuran kasuwanci da ta’addanci tare da Firayi Ministan Singapore Lee Hsien Loong.

input.mt: Mataimakin Firayim Ministan Singapore Wong Kan Seng ya gaishe shi kuma ya tattauna batun kasuwanci da ta'addanci tare da Firayim Ministan Singapore Lee Hsien Loong.
input.src: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

reference: Bayan mako guda da shan kaye a zabukan tsakiyar wa’adi, Bush ya fada wa wasu magoya baya fadadar kasuwanci a Asiya.

input.mt: Bayan mako guda na rashin nasara a zaben tsakiyar lokaci, Bush ya gaya wa masu sauraro game da fadada cinikayya a Asiya.
input.src: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

reference: Firayi Minista Stephen Harper, ya amince da aika kudurin ‘Dokar “Tsarkakakkiyar Iska’ zuwa ga kwamitin gamayyar jam’iyyu don sake dubawa, kafin ayi mata karatu na biyu, bayan taron mintuna 25 na ranar Talata tare da shugaban jam’iyyar NDP Jack Layton a PMO.

input.mt: Firayim Minista Stephen Harper ya amince ya aika da dokar tsabtace iska ta gwamnati ga kwamitin jam'iyyun don bita, kafin karatun ta na biyu, bayan ganawar minti 25 da shugaban NDP Jack Layton a PMO a ranar Talata.
input.src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

reference: Layton ya nemi canje-canje ga dokar ra’ayin mazan jiya yanayi lokacin haduwa da Firayim Ministan, yana tambaya don “cikakken sake rubutawar” dokan Jam'iyyar ra’ayin mazan jiya.

input.mt: Layton ya nemi canje-canje ga dokar muhalli ta masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a lokacin ganawar da ya yi da Firayim Minista, yana neman "cike da cikakken sake rubutawa" na dokar muhalli ta jam'iyyar Conservative.
input.src: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

reference: Tun daga lokacin da Gwamnatin Tarayya ta shiga daukar nauyin asibitin Mersey da ke Devonport, Tasmania, gwamnatin jihar da wasu ‘yan majalisar tarayya sun soki wannan aikin a matsayin ci gaban shirin zaben tarayya da za a kira a watan Nuwamba.

input.mt: Tun lokacin da Gwamnatin Tarayya ta shiga ciki don karɓar kuɗin asibitin Mersey a Devonport, Tasmania, gwamnatin jihar da wasu 'yan majalisa na tarayya sun soki wannan aikin a matsayin abin takaici a gaban zaben tarayya da za a kira a watan Nuwamba.
input.src: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

reference: Amma Firayim Minista John Howard ya ce dokar an yi ta ne domin kare ginin asibitin domin kada gwamnatin Tasmania ta rage masa kima, wajen kara kudaden da dala miliyan 45 ta Australiya.

input.mt: Amma Firayim Minista John Howard ya ce aikin ne kawai don kare wuraren asibitin daga gwamnatin Tasmania, ta ba da karin AUD $ 45 miliyan.
input.src: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

reference: Labari na baya bayan nan ya nuna cewa, nazarin motsin teku na nuna alamun wata tsunami ta taso. Hakika an tabbatar da alamun tsunami a kusa da Pago da Niue.

input.mt: Rahotanni na baya-bayan nan sun nuna cewa akwai tsunami a kusa da Pago Pago da Niue.
input.src: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

reference: Ba a sami wata mummunar barna ko jin ciwo a rahoton da ke fitowa daga Tonga ba, amma kuma wutar lantarki ta katse, abinda ya hana hukumomi samun sanarwar gargadin tsunami wanda hukumar PTWC ta bayar.

input.mt: Babu wani mummunan lalacewa ko raunin da aka ruwaito a Tonga, amma an rasa wutar lantarki na wucin gadi, wanda a cewar rahotanni ya hana hukumomin Tonga karɓar gargaɗin tsunami da PTWC ta bayar.
input.src: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

reference: An rufe duk makarantu goma sha hudu a Huawaii wadanda suke kusa da bakin teku a ranar Laraba duk da cewa an janye jan kunnen.

input.mt: Makarantu 14 a Hawaii da ke kusa da tekun sun rufe a ranar Laraba duk da cewa an soke gargadi.
input.src: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

reference: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya yi maraba da sanarwar.

input.mt: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya yi maraba da sanarwar.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Mai magana da yawun Bush Gordon Johndroe ya kira alwashin da Koriya ta Arewa ta yi “babban mataki ne ga burin cimma nasarar narkar da makaman nukiliya na zirin Koriya.”

input.mt: Mai magana da yawun Bush Gordon Johndroe ya kira alkawarin Koriya ta Arewa "babban mataki ne wajen cimma burin kawar da makaman nukiliya na yankin Koriya".
input.src: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

reference: Guguwar teku ta goma da aka sakawa suna Jerry a kakar guguwar tekun Atalantika ta fara a yau.

input.mt: Guguwa ta goma mai suna ta Atlantic Hurricane Season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, ta samo asali a Tekun Atlantika a yau.
input.src: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

reference: Cibiyar kula da guguwar teku ta kasa (NHC) ta ce a yanzu guguwar Jerry ba ta da wani hadari ga doron kasa.

input.mt: Cibiyar Hurricane ta kasa (NHC) ta ce a wannan lokacin Jerry ba ya kawo barazana ga saukowa.
input.src: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

reference: {Ungiyar Injiniya ta Amurka ta kiyasta cewa inci 6 na ruwan sama zai iya keta ragowar guguwar da ta gabata.

input.mt: Ma'aikatan aikin injiniya na Amirka sun kiyasta cewa ruwan sama mai tsawon inci shida zai iya lalata wuraren da aka lalata a dā.
input.src: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

reference: Unguwa ta tara, wacce ta ga ambaliyar ruwa har sama da ƙafa 20 a lokacin Guguwar Katrina, a halin yanzu tana cikin ruwa mai ɗumbin yawa yayin da levee na kusa ya cika.

input.mt: Ward na Tara, wanda ya ga ambaliyar sama da mita 20 a lokacin Hurricane Katrina, a halin yanzu yana cikin ruwa mai tsayi yayin da aka rufe dam da ke kusa.
input.src: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.

reference: Ruwa na zubewa kan levee a sashi mai fadin kafa 100.

input.mt: Ruwa yana gudana a kan dam a wani sashe mai fadin mita 100.
input.src: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

reference: Mai Gudanarwa na Ƙaramar Majalisa Adam Cuerden ya nuna ɓacin ransa a game da sharewa a lokacin da ya ke magana da Wikinews a watan da ya gabata.

input.mt: Gwamnan Commons Adam Cuerden ya nuna takaici game da sharewa lokacin da ya yi magana da Wikinews a watan da ya gabata.
input.src: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

reference: “Tun daga farko [Wales] ta yi mana karya. Na farko, ta hanyar yin kamar wannan saboda dalilai ne na doka. Na biyu, ta hanyar yin kamar yana sauraron mu, har zuwa goge fasaharsa.”

input.mt: "Ya yi mana ƙarya tun daga farko, na farko, ta wajen yin kamar yana yin hakan ne don dalilai na shari'a, na biyu, ta wajen yin kamar yana sauraronmu, har sai da ya share abubuwan da ya rubuta".
input.src: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

reference: Fushin al’ummar ya kai ga ƙoƙarin da ake yi na samar da tsari dangane da al’amuran da suka jibanci jima’i a shafin da ke daukar miliyoyin kafafen yada labarai da ke da lasisi.

input.mt: Tashin hankali na al'umma ya haifar da ƙoƙarin da ake yi na yanzu don tsara manufofin da suka shafi abubuwan jima'i don shafin da ke da miliyoyin kafofin watsa labarai da aka ba da lasisi a fili.
input.src: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

reference: Mafi yawancin aiki da aka yi a rubuce ne, amma an tsara tsarin ne domin bunkasa lura da ake wa taurarin Sagittarius.

input.mt: Ayyukan da aka yi sun fi yawa a ka'idar, amma an rubuta shirin ne don yin koyi da abubuwan da aka yi game da tauraron Sagittarius.
input.src: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: Tasirin da ƙungiyar ke nema zai haifar ne ta hanyar karfi tsakanin igiyar ruwa tsakanin galaxy da Milky Way mai duhu.

input.mt: Sakamakon da ƙungiyar ke nema zai kasance sakamakon ƙarfin ruwa tsakanin duhu na galaxy da kuma duhu na Milky Way.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Wannan ka'idar tana cewa mafi akasarin duhun da ke kusa da galaxy ana samun shi ne a kusa da galaxy a wani nau'in halo, kuma an yi shi da kananan kananan kwayoyi.

input.mt: Wannan ka'idar ta ce mafi yawan abubuwa masu duhu da ke kewaye da galaxy suna kewaye da galaxy a cikin wani nau'i na halo, kuma an yi shi ne da yawa kananan ƙwayoyin.
input.src: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

reference: Rahotannin talabijin sun nuna farin hayaki na fitowa daga shukar.

input.mt: Rahotanni na talabijin sun nuna fararen hayaki da ke fitowa daga wurin.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Mahukuntan yankin suna gargadin mazauna yankin da ke kusa da masana’antar da su kasance cikin gidajensu, a kashe na’urorin sanyaya ɗaki kuma kada a sha ruwan famfo.

input.mt: Hukumomin yankin sun gargadi mazauna yankin su zauna a gida, su kashe iska kuma kada su sha ruwan famfo.
input.src: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

reference: A cewar hukumar nukiliya ta Japan, an gano sinadaran caesium da iodine masu hadari a ma’aikatar.

input.mt: A cewar hukumar nukiliya ta Japan, an gano cesium da iodine masu aikin rediyo a tashar.
input.src: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

reference: Hukumomi suna hasashen cewa wannan yana nuna cewa mai yiwuwa gangunan da a ke ajiye man uranium a wurin sun fashe kuma suna zuba.

input.mt: Hukumomi sun yi hasashen cewa wannan ya nuna cewa kwantena da ke ɗauke da man fetur na uranium a wurin na iya fashewa kuma suna zubar da ruwa.
input.src: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

reference: Dokta Tony Moll ya gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka (XDR-TB) a yankin Afirka ta Kudu KwaZulu-Natal.

input.mt: Dr. Tony Moll ya gano tarin fuka mai tsayayya da miyagun ƙwayoyi (XDR-TB) a yankin KwaZulu-Natal na Afirka ta Kudu.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

reference: A cikin wata hira, ya ce sabuwar cutar “na da matukar tada hankali da firgitarwa saboda yawan mace-macen da ta ke haddasawa.”

input.mt: A wata hira, ya ce sabon nau'in "yana da matukar damuwa da damuwa saboda yawan mutuwar".
input.src: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

reference: Kila wasu marasa lafiya sun kamu da cutar a asibiti, Dokta Moll yana tsammani, kuma aƙalla biyu sun kasance ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya na asibiti.

input.mt: Dokta Moll ya ce wasu marasa lafiya za su iya kamuwa da cutar a asibiti, kuma akalla biyu daga cikinsu ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya ne.
input.src: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

reference: Nan da shekara ɗaya, mutum daya mai ɗauke da cutar zai shafa ma mutane 10 zuwa 15 da suka kusance shi.

input.mt: A cikin shekara guda, mutum mai kamuwa da cutar zai iya kamuwa da mutane 10 zuwa 15 da suka yi kusa da shi.
input.src: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

reference: Sai dai, kashin XDR-TB da ke jikin duk rukunin mutane da ke da tarin fuka har yanzu da alamar yana ƙasa; 6,000 daga cikin jimillar mutane 330,000 da suka kamu a kowane lokaci a Afirka ta Kudu.

input.mt: Duk da haka, kashi na XDR-TB a cikin dukan rukunin mutanen da ke fama da tarin fuka har yanzu ba shi da yawa; mutane 6,000 daga jimillar mutane 330,000 da suka kamu da cutar a kowane lokaci a Afirka ta Kudu.
input.src: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

reference: Taurarin dan adam ɗin, waɗanda duka biyun nauyinsu ya haura da ƙarin fam 1,000, kuma suke tafiyar kimanin mil 17,500 a sa'a guda, sun yi karo da juna mil 491 sama da Duniya.

input.mt: Wadannan tauraron dan adam, duka biyu suna da nauyin fiye da fam 1,000, kuma suna tafiya da kimanin kilomita 17,500 a kowace awa, sun yi karo da mil 491 a sama da duniya.
input.src: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

reference: Masana kimiyya sun ce fashewar da hatsarin ya haifar na da girma.

input.mt: Masana kimiyya sun ce fashewar da ta faru ta kasance babba.
input.src: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

reference: Har yanzu suna ƙoƙarin gano yadda girman hatsarin ya kasance da kuma yadda abin zai shafi Duniya.

input.mt: Har yanzu suna ƙoƙarin sanin girman abin da ya faru da kuma yadda hakan zai shafi duniya.
input.src: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

input.src: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

reference: Hukumomi a Ohio sun sanar da cewa wata likita wadda ke aiki a wani asibiti a Pittsburg, za’a caje ta da laifin kisan kai bayan an gano gawar mahaifiyarta a mace a wajen ajiye kaya na bayan motar ta ranar Laraba.

input.src: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

input.src: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: An ba da rahoton kamuwa da cutar na farko a wannan kakar a karshen Yuli.
